name: Paid API Agent
description: Turn an API endpoint into a receipt-gated paid product on the hosted DNA x402 rail.
degenPitch: Put a tollbooth in front of any API and get paid with receipts.
whatItDoes: Requests a quote before premium API access.
Commits the quote and verifies payment proof.
Unlocks the paid API response only after signed receipt verification.
cursorPrompt: Build a paid API endpoint using DNA x402. Use the hosted API URL from DNA_X402_API_URL, request a quote, commit it, submit payment proof, verify the signed receipt, show the fee waterfall, and unlock the paid response. Do not implement backend custody or backend signing.
suggestedPrompt: Build a paid API endpoint using DNA x402. Use the hosted API URL from DNA_X402_API_URL, request a quote, commit it, submit payment proof, verify the signed receipt, show the fee waterfall, and unlock the paid response. Do not implement backend custody or backend signing.
receiptProofBehavior: Payment proof is verified by the hosted rail.
Paid retry unlocks the same paid response without charging twice.
